name: greenwake_reference32_tile_family_v1
direction: Refine terrain toward the approved 32px reference target. Generate or author terrain-only tiles first. Decorations, trees, rocks, logs, flowers, and grass clumps belong in prop/deco passes, not baked into terrain.

required_shapes_first_gate.prompt_shape: single flat 32x32 2:1 isometric grass diamond tile, bright green top, sparse dark grass speckles, transparent corners, no side walls
single flat 32x32 2:1 isometric dirt diamond tile, warm brown top, sparse darker pixel texture, transparent corners, no side walls
single raised 32x32 isometric grass block, bright green top face dominant, short warm brown side faces, clean underside shadow
single raised 32x32 isometric dirt block, warm dirt top face dominant, short darker brown side faces, clean underside shadow

negative_prompt: tree, bush, rock, flower, log, stump, prop, item, character, creature, building, wall, complete map, scene background, UI frame, text, watermark, realistic render, noisy clutter, object on top, oversized side wall
